extraction.one_line_summary: QUINTANA Nairo attacked at 3.1km to go after Lopez's isolation allowed a 6-rider move, taking both stage win and critical GC time
tactical_patterns: Astana's TTT dominance became fatal weakness when Lopez had only Izaguirre to chase 6-rider move with 17km remaining
Jumbo Visma's Tony Martin pacing on pre-climb intermediate sprint shattered peloton before final ascent, tactical reset after TTT crash
Mitchelton-Scott's Nieve initiated winning 6-rider selection post-summit when no team had numbers to control fractured descent attacks
Quintana attacked with 3.1km at group's hesitation moment rather than summit, avoiding chase organization on technical descent

rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: dropped 1km from summit while teammate Martin set brutal pace below, questions stage race form after Tour podium
rider_signals.ROCHE Nico: positive: tactically mature to anchor winning move for bonus seconds rather than chase Quintana, prioritized jersey over stage
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: bridged to elite selection day after TTT crash suggests resurgent form and climbing legs returned
rider_signals.BENNETT George: positive: AG2R rider repeatedly animated final climb with Formolo before winning move, showed willingness to spend matches early
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: red jersey with single teammate against organized chase reveals Astana's depth problem despite TTT strength
